arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim gives his verdict on Rasmus Hojlund's rant at 'criminal' Diogo Dalot as Man United are left frustrated by draw at Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Man United were left ruing an opportunity missed after Thursday's 1-1 draw at Real Sociedad. They took the lead in through Joshua Zirkzee but were pegged back by a Mikel Oyarzabal penalty.

arts.ttl: “They are one of the best teams in Europe” – Real Sociedad manager Imanol Alguacil on Manchester United
arts.sum: Real Sociedad are in a rather precarious position in their Europa League tie with Manchester United, following a 1-1 draw in the first leg on Thursday. However, it could have been worse, as they had trailed at the Reale Arena before Mikel Oyarzabal scored from the penalty spot. It was a relatively poor performance from […] The post “They are one of the best teams in Europe” – Real Sociedad manager Imanol Alguacil on Manchester United appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Matthijs de Ligt and Casemiro send the same Man United rallying cry after Real Sociedad draw
arts.sum: Manchester United were held to a 1-1 draw by Real Sociedad in the first leg of their Europa League round of 16 clash in San Sebastian

arts.ttl: Amorim tells Utd players to find ruthless streak
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has told his Manchester United players that they will have to be more ruthless in front of goal if they are to progress in the Europa League following their 1-1 draw with Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Report: Man United frontrunners for Bundesliga speedster who can play across front three
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly eyeing Borussia Dortmund’s Karim Adeyemi as a potential signing ahead of the summer transfer window, with speculation growing about his possible departure from the German club. According to Fichajes, the Red Devils are said to be in a strong position to secure Adeyemi’s services after the season, with Dortmund now seemingly […] The post Report: Man United frontrunners for Bundesliga speedster who can play across front three appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes gives verdict on 'strange' penalty decision against Bruno Fernandes as Man United are held to a draw at Real Sociedad
arts.sum: The hosts were given the opportunity to level proceedings 20 minutes from time when VAR official Pol van Boekel spotted that Fernandes had handled the ball with his left arm in the area.

arts.ttl: 'If I'm being honest': Paul Merson predicts the result of Manchester United vs Arsenal clash
Paul Scholes slams Alejandro Garnacho for 'sulking' AGAIN after being substituted in Man United's draw with Real Sociedad - just a week he did the same against Ipswich
arts.sum: United's poor form continued on Thursday night as they drew 1-1 with the LaLiga side in the Europa League, with Joshua Zirkzee 's opener cancelled out following a handball.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim warns two Man Utd stars not to fight after Europa League bust-up
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim told his players he does not want any “fighting” after Rasmus Hojlund clashed with Diogo Dalot for not crossing the ball when he was in a position to score

arts.ttl: Man United Star's Poor Season Hit New Low In Real Sociedad Draw
arts.sum: Manchester United's Alejandro Garnacho has come under fire despite grabbing an assist in the 1-1 draw against Real Sociedad.
